ddls:
CREATE TABLE "releases" (
  "release_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each release */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the release */,
  "update_number" INTEGER /* Update number associated with the release */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the release was made available */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the release file in MB */,
  "download_link" TEXT /* Link to download the release file */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the software product */,
  "is_major_update" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the release is a major update */,
  "is_patch" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the release is a minor patch */,
  "released_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who released the software */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Detailed changelog for the release */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("release_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_releases_released_by FOREIGN KEY ("released_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_releases_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES software_products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "software_products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each software product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the software product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the software product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the software product */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the product was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the product was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the product (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user logging into the system */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, admin, user) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user for security */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "release_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each release note */,
  "release_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the release it corresponds to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of changes or features included in the release */,
  "is_major_note" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the note is for a major update */,
  "is_patch_note" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the note is for a minor patch */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the author of the release note */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_release_notes_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the release */,
  "release_id" INTEGER /* ID of the release being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the release was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., download, view) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_release_id FOREIGN KEY ("release_id") REFERENCES releases ("release_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "release_id" INTEGER /* ID of the release associated with the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, failed) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification message */,
  "sent_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who sent the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_sent_by FOREIGN KEY ("sent_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_release_id FOREIGN KEY ("release_id") REFERENCES releases ("release_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., developer, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role's responsibilities */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
